mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fridge_item WHERE member_id=#{id} ORDER BY expire_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fridge_item(ingredient_name, quantity, expire_date, created_date, freezer, member_id) VALUES( #{ingredient_name}, #{quantity}, #{expire_date}, now(), #{freezer}, #{id} )
mapper.update: UPDATE fridge_item SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE fridge_id=#{firdge_id}
